National Highway, Barangay Uno, Calamba City, Laguna

Be Future-Ready at STI College Calamba

Experience modern technology-driven education, industry-ready programs, and innovative learning environments designed to prepare students for real-world careers.

Learn About Us View Campus
Since 1983 STI has helped shape technology-driven, industry-ready learners across the Philippines.

Future-ready learning

Technology-driven education in the heart of Calamba

STI College Calamba is located along National Highway in Barangay Uno, Calamba City, Laguna. Inspired by STI's nationwide mission, the campus supports modern classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and technology-enhanced learning facilities for students preparing for competitive careers.

Why STI Calamba

Built for skills, confidence, and career readiness

01

Industry-Driven Education

STI College integrates industry-based learning and modern teaching methods to prepare students for future careers in technology, business, hospitality, and multimedia.

02

Modern Facilities

Students learn in air-conditioned classrooms, computer laboratories, libraries, and simulation rooms equipped with updated educational technology.

03

Learn Anytime, Anywhere

STI supports digital and flexible learning through online platforms, accessible resources, and technology-enhanced education systems.

04

Career Opportunities

STI promotes Enrollment-to-Employment programs that help students build professional skills and prepare for future careers.

05

Student Activities

Students participate in seminars, competitions, workshops, and campus-wide events that enhance leadership and creativity.

06

Technology-Focused Environment

STI College emphasizes innovation, digital literacy, and real-world technical experience for future-ready graduates.

Campus updates

STI news and student milestones

March 2026

STI Students Win Innovation Competition

STI students earned recognition during a regional innovation competition after presenting technology-driven solutions focused on community safety and digital accessibility.

June 2025

STI Calamba Celebrates Academic Excellence

Students from STI College Calamba achieved strong performances during interschool academic competitions and leadership events across Senior High School and College divisions.

January 2025

New Learning Facilities Enhance Student Experience

STI continues to improve its campuses with modern classrooms, upgraded laboratories, enhanced libraries, and technology-enabled learning spaces.

February 2026

Career Preparation Programs Expanded

STI strengthens Enrollment-to-Employment initiatives through seminars, workshops, interview preparation programs, and industry partnerships.

Start with confidence

Explore a campus designed for modern learners.
